message:
fix: workspace-wide clippy + fmt cleanup, all quality gates green

- gf256.rs: c as u64 → u64::from(c) (cast_lossless)
- state.rs: add handling_leaks to Debug impl (missing_fields_in_debug),
  fix significant_drop_tightening in region_closed test
- raptorq_conformance.rs: add SymbolEquationArityMismatch match arm
- lean_ci_verification_profiles.rs: allow(too_many_lines) on test
- refinement_conformance_report.rs: split + allow(too_many_lines)
- pipeline.rs: rustfmt normalization
- Includes concurrent agent changes: session.rs regression tests,
  lab/runtime.rs futurelocked step fix, io_uring fcntl pre-flight,
  reactor source improvements, lean coverage artifacts

Validated: cargo check --all-targets, cargo clippy --all-targets,
cargo fmt --check — all pass with isolated CARGO_TARGET_DIR.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
